data.gate3_platform_risk_label: Material platform dependency with mixed enforcement history
data.verdict: Gate 3 platform-dependency risk: 3/5 — Material platform dependency with mixed enforcement history. Detected 4 platform deps: Apple Screen Time API, Android Digital Wellbeing, macOS, iOS / Apple platform APIs. Restrictive history: Apple Screen Time API, Android Digital Wellbeing, iOS / Apple platform APIs. B2C + solo framing: App Store policy risk dominates. Apple "system feature" pattern has killed prior categories (Spotlight → launchers, Notes → note apps). Treat Gate 3 as CONDITIONAL — corroborate with check_big_tech_encroachment before deciding.
